snps.effect_template: 4q25 locus near PITX2. T allele significantly increases atrial fibrillation risk.
Second independent 4q25 variant for AF risk.
ZFHX3 (zinc finger homeobox 3) variant associated with atrial fibrillation risk (OR ~1.25).
KCNN3 potassium channel variant affecting atrial fibrillation susceptibility.
CAV1 (caveolin 1) variant modestly associated with atrial fibrillation risk.
PRRX1 (paired related homeobox 1) variant linked to AF susceptibility.
SCN5A sodium channel variant affecting cardiac conduction and atrial fibrillation risk.

recommendation_template: Be aware of AF symptoms (irregular heartbeat, palpitations). Reduce modifiable risk factors: maintain healthy weight, limit alcohol, manage blood pressure.

studies.title: Variants in ZFHX3 and 4q25 are associated with atrial fibrillation
studies.finding: rs2200733 at 4q25 strongly associated with AF (OR=1.72)

studies.title: Large scale replication and meta-analysis of variants on chromosome 4q25 associated with atrial fibrillation
studies.finding: Confirmed multiple atrial fibrillation susceptibility loci including ZFHX3, KCNN3, CAV1, PRRX1, and SCN5A variants
